title: Reader Outcomes, Publisher Stewardship, and Service Charter · Failure Repair Bay
summary: A preserved Go feed-service run contains one plausible discovery, URL, XML, normalization, fetch, SQL, transaction, lease, goroutine, handler, accessibility, migration, or release defect; locate the first failed invariant before editing. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in reader-centered feed-service charter and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidenc…
objectives: Define reader group, decision, task journey, freshness need, harm, and observable value before choosing architecture.
Define respectful fetch frequency, identification, caching, opt-out, correction, deletion, and incident contacts for publishers.
Separate discovery, fetch, parse, normalize, persist, schedule, serve, and present responsibilities with explicit ports.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Feed aggregation and Go Inspect the failure record · Debug Feed Go Reader Decision
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug Go team handles case 8975 during a multilingual university archive import. Build deterministic Go evidence to gate a useful reader and publisher service charter on observable decisions and inclusive evidence; publisher fetch and retention budgets must remain explicit; then change one tenant, cursor, reader-state, authorization, cache, or accessibility condition without leaking state. Browser Go uses pure bounded models and original RSS, Atom, HTTP, PostgreSQL, and reader fixtures only. Real DNS, sockets, XML libraries, PostgreSQL, processes, signals, race, load, containers, accessibility review, backups, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Define reader group, decision, task journey, freshness need, harm, and observable value before choosing architecture.

Inspect the Feed Go Reader Decision trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?
